title: Huryfox Artificial Flowers Garlands - 5 Strand 230cm Long Artificial Flower Vines for Decorations, Faux White Rose Floral Arch with Realistic Design for Home, Garden, Indoor/Outdoor Weddings, Parties
features: Size and Quantity: The Huryfox Artificial Rose Garland set includes 5 individual garlands, each measuring 230 cm in length. Each garland features 9 meticulously designed roses, adding a touch of elegance to your décor.

High-Quality Materials: The garlands are crafted from durable plastic. Please note, the garlands are not suitable for long-term exposure to direct sunlight or rain. Prolonged exposure may cause fading or aging. Ensure to keep the garlands in shaded or covered areas to maintain their appearance.

Versatile Decoration: Ideal for a variety of settings including weddings, parties, anniversaries, and home décor. The garlands can be used to enhance door frames, arches, walls, railings, and more, creating a refined atmosphere for any occasion.

Realistic Design: Each rose is designed with intricate details to bring a vibrant and realistic touch to your decorations. The attention to detail ensures that your space will have a visually appealing floral arrangement.

Installation Instructions: Gently remove the garlands from their packaging and prepare a spacious area for hanging. Choose a clean, suitable location such as door frames, arches, or walls, avoiding areas with sharp objects. You can adjust the garlands to your desired shape and direction for a personalized look. For a fuller appearance, combine multiple garlands.

Usage and Maintenance Tips: To ensure the longevity of your garlands, avoid prolonged exposure to direct sunlight as this may cause fading or aging. The garlands are not designed for long-term outdoor use or exposure to rain; remove them during rainy weather and store them properly afterward. For regular cleaning, gently wipe the flowers and vines with a soft, dry cloth or a slightly damp cloth to remove dust. Avoid using harsh cleaning agents that could damage the color or material. When not in use, store the garlands in a dry place and avoid folding or crushing them to maintain their shape and appearance.
Suitable for All Occasions: Perfect for arches, wedding venues, birthday parties, anniversaries, and both indoor and outdoor events. Enhance any occasion with a touch of romance and beauty.
